ValidationRule.description: We cannot move a candidate from “In Person Interview” to “References” or “Offer” until all required fields In Person Debrief Section are completed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Stage__c ), CASE(PRIORVALUE(Stage__c ),"In Person Interview",1,0)=1, OR( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "References"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Offer")), OR ( ISBLANK(In_Person_Call_Experience__c), ISBLANK(In_Person_Facility_Aesthetics__c), ISBLANK(How_Was_The_Commute__c), ISBLANK (Receive_Mentorship__c), ISBLANK (Impression_of_Manager__c), ISBLANK(Comfortable_with_Expectations__c), ISBLANK (Does_Org_Stability_Match_Goals__c), ISBLANK (Forget_To_Ask_Questions__c ), ISBLANK (Discuss_Salary_and_Benefits__c ), ISBLANK (Do_you_need_followup_contact_info__c), ISBLANK (Interviewing_Anywhere_Else__c), ISBLANK (Where_Interviewing__c), ISBLANK (Rank_Your_Other_Opportunities__c), ISBLANK (Factors_to_Accept__c), ISBLANK (Anticipate_Decision_By__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must complete the In Person Debrief Section before moving to the next Stage. Any non applicable questions enter NA. Thank you
